item.title: Alien: Isolation 2 announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

The long-awaited sequel to 2014’s Alien: Isolation.

Publisher SEGA and developer Creative Assembly have officially announced horror first-person shooter sequel Alien: Isolation 2 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam). A release date was not announced.

“It has been over a decade since we created the original Alien: Isolation and I am so excited to show everyone the first glimpse of the sequel,” said Creative Assembly creative director Al Hope in a press release. “Our dedicated Survival team at Creative Assembly has been working hard to create a new, evolved Isolation experience continuing the legacy of the Alien franchise, making the eponymous killer smarter, the environment harsher and the chance of survival slimmer.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via SEGA:

The next chapter in the Alien: Isolation series, Alien: Isolation 2 will bring players face-to-face once more with cinema’s deadliest killer: Alien’s Xenomorph. With a brand-new setting, story and protagonist, players will embrace a whole new adventure, while experiencing the same deadly tension which established the original game as the ultimate survival-horror experience.

On a remote, storm-ravaged colony-world, players will endure the elements as they navigate the planet’s surface, and explore the claustrophobic confines of the Weyland-Yutani outpost of Kurosaki Station. It’s a new hunting-ground for the Alien, forcing players to improvise and develop new tools, techniques and tactics to survive the deadly game of cat-and-mouse.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/alien-isolation-2-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Resident Evil Veronica announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Capcom has announced a remake of Resident Evil: Code Veronica for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam). It will launch in 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via Capcom:

Resident Evil Veronica, a remake of the beloved classic Resident Evil Code: Veronica, was announced for release in 2027 at Summer Game Fest! The next chapter in the iconic Resident Evil survival horror series features the return of fan-favorite heroine Claire Redfield and will release across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC via Steam.

Resident Evil Veronica will draw players into a desperate escape filled with horror and madness through the isolated, zombie-filled Rockfort Island. Developed on Capcom’s proprietary RE ENGINE, the game will introduce modernized gameplay with a chilling level of realism designed to push survival horror to new heights.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here: English / Japanese.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯

item.title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
■ The Thrilling Conclusion of the Final Fantasy VII Remake Saga

Embark on a final journey aboard the airship Highwind—one that will decide the fate of the planet.

In the third and final entry in the FINAL FANTASY VII Remake Series, the scale has never been larger, and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale.

A vast planet awaits. Everything leads here.

The game will release simultaneously on PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2, Xbox Series X|S and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Xbox PC in spring 2027, the commemorative 30th anniversary of the original Final Fantasy VII.

■ Story

A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation and their nemesis Sephiroth nears godhood, Cloud Strife and his companions take to the skies aboard the airship Highwind and set forth to face their final battle, with the fate of the planet hanging in the balance.

■ World

Airship: The Highwind

In a seamlessly connected open world, Cloud and his companions take to the skies aboard the airship Highwind, embarking on a sweeping journey across the world as a crisis looms over the planet.

The entire planet is freely explorable via the iconic Highwind airship. Players can drop in via parachute anywhere, seamlessly transitioning from air to land.

New Regions

The entire planet serves as the stage for your adventure. In addition to areas featured in previous entries, players can explore newly introduced regions.

—Mideel Region

Encompassing the island of Mideel, this region is a lush tropical rainforest characterized by sweltering humidity.

—Wutai Region

Home to descendants of ninja, the town of Wutai is lined with beautiful architecture, characterized by vermilionpainted wooden structures and tiled roofs.

■ Characters and Combat

Experience the series’ iconic hybrid of real-time action and command-based combat in its most polished form yet. Seamlessly switch between party members, issue commands in Tactical Mode, and unleash powerful abilities and synergies to overcome colossal threats.

◆ New Playable Party Members

The iconic ensemble, fully united. New playable party members expand your strategic options through the remake project’s signature combat system, centered on dynamic switching between characters with distinct abilities.

Vincent Valentine (voiced by Matt Mercer in English)

“I won’t return to my coffin until we’ve put Sephiroth in his.”

A deft gunslinger, whose lightning-fast gunplay and ferocious, bestial transformations can devastate the battlefield.

Cid Highwind (void by J. Michael Tatum in English)

“The Leaping Lancer… the Dashing Dragoon… the one and only Cid Highwind!”

An ace pilot of the airship Highwind, capable of controlling the flow of battle by swiftly closing the distance for powerful single-target lance strikes or unleashing sweeping area-of-effect attacks.

◆ New Combat System: Fits

A new system that allows you to change your characters’ combat style by equipping different outfits, each unlocking unique abilities and expanding your strategic options. Alongside FITS, customize your build with weapons and materia to prepare your team for powerful foes.

—The Warrior

Enhances offensive capabilities, enabling a wide range of aggressive playstyles.

—The Black Mage

Specializes in offensive magic, enabling spell-focused combat.

Achieve new heights of power with this system by equipping unique outfits that bestow new movesets, evoking classic Final Fantasy jobs like Warrior and Black Mage. Enjoy each distinct look as you refine your build to suit your playstyle and develop your strategy.

◆ New Enemy: Weapons

Weapons are monstrous guardians awakened by the planet itself to defend against Meteor, the ultimate destructive magic. Indiscriminate in their destruction, even the Weapons are enemies that Cloud and his companions must stand against.

■ About the Series

The Final Fantasy VII Remake series reimagines the original Final Fantasy VII, first released in 1997, across three distinct games using modern technology.

The journey begins in Midgar—a mako-powered city controlled by the powerful Shinra Electric Power Company. Cloud Strife, a former SOLDIER, is drawn into a pivotal encounter with Avalanche, an anti-Shinra group, setting him on a grand journey that will determine the fate of the planet.

Building upon the original game, this reimagined Final Fantasy VII evolves into a new experience, featuring expansive world exploration, a combat system that blends strategy and action, and an adventure shared with a cast of unforgettable allies.

The Remake Series began with Final Fantasy VII Remake in 2020, followed by Final Fantasy VII Rebirth in 2024. It has received critical acclaim worldwide, earning numerous “Game of the Year” awards and nominations, along with perfect review scores from over 140 media outlets.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here: English / Japanese.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/final-fantasy-vii-revelation-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
